scripts.docker:prisma-migrate: cd packages/db && npx prisma migrate dev && cd ../..
scripts.start:http: npm run docker:prisma-migrate && cd apps/http-server && npm run start
scripts.start:ws: npm run docker:prisma-migrate && cd apps/ws-server && npm run start
scripts.start:web: npm run docker:prisma-migrate && cd apps/web && npm run start
